/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libabsl_base.so.2407.0.0 -o libabsl_base.so.2407.0.0 CMakeFiles/base.dir/internal/cycleclock.cc.o CMakeFiles/base.dir/internal/spinlock.cc.o CMakeFiles/base.dir/internal/sysinfo.cc.o CMakeFiles/base.dir/internal/thread_identity.cc.o CMakeFiles/base.dir/internal/unscaledcycleclock.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN:" libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2407.0.0 libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2407.0.0 -lrt libabsl_log_severity.so.2407.0.0 -lpthread
